paper_title: Solving Quantitative Reasoning Problems with Language Models

raw_extraction.innovation: Minerva achieves state-of-the-art performance on quantitative reasoning tasks by training a large language model on a high-quality dataset combining natural language with formal mathematical expressions, enabling it to generate step-by-step solutions using correct LaTeX notation without relying on external tools
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Mathematical webpages (filtered for math content), arXiv preprints, general natural language data (same as PaLM pretraining)
raw_extraction.application: Solving mathematics and science problems in natural language, physics, chemistry, economics, and other STEM domains
raw_extraction.research_problem: Quantitative reasoning in natural language, including mathematics, science, and engineering problems requiring symbolic manipulation and numerical computation
